case_title: CAITLIN MORROW VS. STITCH FIX, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CAITLIN MORROW'S MOTION REQUESTING DISMISSAL OF CLASS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. THE MOTION IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO THE NAMED PLAINTIFF MS. MORROW AND DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO THE OTHER CLASS MEMBERS. ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S MOTION REQUESTING DISMISSAL OF CLASS ACTION IS SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR. , CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion Requesting Dismissal Of Class Action With Prejudice
Off Calendar Dec-04-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Kyle McClean, Esq. 213-376-3739 Siri & Glimstad LLP for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

Hearing is held. The Court shares its views. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF CAITLIN MORROW's Motion Requesting Dismissal Of Class Action With Prejudice.

The motion is dismissed with prejudice as to the named Plaintiff Ms. Morrow and Dismissed without prejudice as to the other class members.

Order granting Plaintiff's motion requesting dismissal of class action is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. , Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion Requesting Dismissal Of Class Action With Prejudice
Off Calendar Nov-15-2023 Continued To Dec-04-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Plaintiff's Motion Requesting Dismissal Of Class Action With Prejudice.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court's tentative ruling advised of a required hearing. The court takes the subject motion off calendar for failure to appear.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing, due to an oversight, this matter is being continued to Dec-04-2023 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2023 Continued To Jan-03-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
